generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text presents a compelling argument against conscription, citing lower military readiness scores in countries with mandatory service. request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know? Countries with mandatory service actually have lower military readiness scores than volunteer forces. Our allies in Europe are struggling with this same issue. Maybe it's time we rethink conscription and focus on quality over quantity for true national security. #DefenseReform #NationalSecurity
